creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 151702
shar file for the new port deskutils/currtime

currtime is a command-line operated real time clock. currtime displays the
current system date and time in a Unix-compatible format.

WWW: http://www.neelc.org/software/currtime

Keep in mind that the shar file is attached, and the Poudriere Build Log will be uploaded shortly.
-Neel
